EmailTemplate.description: Response to request for insurance certificate.
EmailTemplate.name: Insurance Certificates
EmailTemplate.subject: Certificates of Insurance
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge.
In line with insurance industry practice, we do not issue certificates of insurance for Professional Indemnity and Public Liability insurance.
However, your Policy Schedule covers all relevant details of your insurance and most employers are happy to accept this as confirmation of cover.
Your documents include an Employers' Liability certificate, which is the only certificate you are required to provide by law. If you need us to resend your policy documents, then please let me know.
We can also provide copies directly to your agency upon your request - just let us know where to send them.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
